hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.rs) command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt --edition 2021 "$f" || true;; esac

export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"; echo "[authlyn] cargo: $(command -v cargo >/dev/null && echo present || echo MISSING) | cargo-leptos: $(command -v cargo-leptos >/dev/null && echo present || echo MISSING) | surreal: $(command -v surreal >/dev/null && echo present || echo MISSING) | dev-DB on :8000: $(pgrep -f 'surreal start' >/dev/null && echo up || echo down). Tests need --features ssr AND a live SurrealDB."
